mapper.insert:
insert into event_depart_member (event_id, depart_member_id, is_notify, is_assigned, assigned_time, notify_time,create_time) values
( #{item.eventId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.departMemberId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isNotify,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isAssigned,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.assignedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.notifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update create_time = sysdate()
